scope_comment: Mutation testing for the pure i18n logic named by
Deliberately NOT mutated: strings.ts (a data table; mutating string
literals only proves strings change -- the table is locked by the
exhaustive en/ko assertions in test/translate.test.ts), useT.ts and
systemLocale.ts (React/IO bindings, covered by the app integration
runner_comment: Mirrors packages/shared: tests are node:test files, so the tap runner
executes each compiled test file with `node` and parses the TAP stream.
buildCommand compiles the instrumented sandbox once (mutant switching
does the rest); see tsconfig.stryker.json for why that build is
thresholds_comment: break is 80 (not packages/shared's 75) because decision 6 sets >= 80 as
the floor for the i18n lookup modules.
sandbox_comment: tsconfig.test.json is excluded from the sandbox on purpose: it extends
triggers Stryker's tsconfig preprocessor, which dynamically imports
'typescript' from the npx install tree where it is not present. The
sandbox build only ever uses the self-contained tsconfig.stryker.json.
